arts.ttl: Barcelona manager Hansi Flick facing selection quandary ahead of Inter clash after Copa del Rey final
arts.sum: Barcelona manager Hansi Flick masterminded his way to a second trophy in charge of the Catalan side this past Saturday, as his team came through for him in extra time against Real Madrid. Another impressive effort, nonetheless it gives Flick a selection headache for their Champions League final this Wednesday night at Montjuic, as his […] The post Barcelona manager Hansi Flick facing selection quandary ahead of Inter clash after Copa del Rey final appeared first on Football España.
